title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.341 - Annual election, when held
text:
162.341.  Annual election, when held. — The annual election in seven-director districts, except urban districts, shall be held on municipal election days.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 3-34, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 165.330)
